name: Advanced Machines Add-on
description: Advanced Machines Add-on is a Minecraft add-on that introduces automated machines, generators, and advanced technology to improve resource processing and efficiency.
author: unknown

name: Supplementaries
description: Supplementaries is a Minecraft add-on that adds various small decorative blocks and useful items to enhance building and everyday gameplay.
author: Creeperfile

name: Furniture Add-on
description: Furniture Add-on is a Minecraft add-on that adds a variety of decorative furniture like sofas, tables, and appliances to design and customize your builds.
author: Creeperfile

name: Hydra Bosses
description: Hydra Bosses is a Minecraft add-on that adds powerful hydra boss creatures with multiple heads, special attacks, and challenging combat encounters for players.
author: Creeperfile

name: Pop-Ups Add-on
description: Pop-Ups Add-on is a Minecraft add-on that adds pre-made structures, building blueprints, and ready-to-place constructions like houses and buildings for quick world building and design.
author: Creeperfile

name: Infinity Dungeons
description: Infinity Dungeons is a Minecraft add-on that generates endless procedurally created dungeons filled with monsters, loot, and challenges for continuous exploration and combat.
author: Creeperfile

name: Cave Biomes Add-on
description: Cave Biomes Add-on is a Minecraft Bedrock add-on that expands caves with new biome types, unique underground environments, and custom cave generation for more variety and exploration.
author: creeperfile

name: Furniture City
description: Furniture City is a Minecraft add-on that adds a fully furnished city with detailed interiors, modern buildings, and decorative furniture to explore and use.
author: creeperfile

name: Morph into mobs!
description: Morph into Mobs! is a Minecraft add-on that lets you transform into different mobs in the game, gaining their abilities, appearance, and special powers.
author: creeperfile

name: Anime jutsu Add-on
description: The Anime Jutsu Add-on is a Minecraft mod that adds anime-style powers, jutsus, energy systems, and boss fights, turning normal combat into an anime-inspired fighting experience.
author: creeperfile

name: Park of Horrors map
description: It’s a horror theme park in Minecraft with mini-games, jumpscares, and fighting ghosts/monsters inside different rides and areas.
author: creeperfile

name: Marvel Zombies Add-on
description: Marvel Zombies Add-on is a Minecraft mod that turns the world into a zombie apocalypse featuring Marvel characters like zombified heroes and villains, along with new enemies, powers, and weapons.
author: creeperfile

name: DreamWorks Dragon map
description: DreamWorks Dragons Map (Minecraft) is an official Minecraft Bedrock DLC/map based on How to Train Your Dragon, where you explore the island of Berk, ride dragons, complete missions, and live in the DreamWorks dragon world.
author: creeperfile

name: Mob Weapons Add-on
description: Mob Weapons Add-on is a Minecraft Bedrock addon that lets you craft and use special weapons inspired by mobs, each with unique powers, animations, and abilities.
author: creeperfile
